name: spike-local-first-turso
description: THROWAWAY spike PoC for openspec change `spike-local-first-turso-sync`. Isolated from the pnpm workspace (lives in spike/, outside the apps/* and packages/* globs) per design Decision 5. NOT a maintained part of the app — delete/archive once FINDINGS.md records the go/no-go.
comment_turso_cli: The Turso CLI is NOT an npm dependency — install it on the host per README (`brew install tursodatabase/tap/turso` or the curl installer). It is spike-local host tooling, never added to apps/web.
